ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., customer, administrator) */,
  "facebook_id" TEXT /* Facebook ID of the user (if registered through Facebook) */,
  "gmail_id" TEXT /* Gmail ID of the user (if registered through Gmail) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stories" (
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user story */,
  "user_story" TEXT /* Description of the user story */,
  "acceptance_criteria" TEXT /* Acceptance criteria for the user story */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the user story (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "release_sprint" TEXT /* Release sprint for the user story */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the user story */,
  "estimated_effort" INTEGER /* Estimated effort required to complete the user story */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user story was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user story was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., registration, login, logout) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the activity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user who performed the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the car */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the car */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the car */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the car */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the car */,
  "vin" TEXT /* VIN of the car */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the car was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the car was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_resale_values" (
  "car_resale_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car resale value */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car */,
  "resale_value" TEXT /* Resale value of the car */,
  "estimated_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of the resale value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the resale value was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the resale value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_resale_value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_attempts" (
  "login_attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who attempted to login */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date when the login attempt was made */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who attempted to login */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user who attempted to login */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the login attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_attempt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reset_password_tokens" (
  "reset_password_token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reset password token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who requested the reset password token */,
  "token" TEXT /* Reset password token */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date when the reset password token expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the reset password token was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the reset password token was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_password_token_id")
)
